author: JB
text: right, as far a s I know, we have no energy / hunger system at all right now, and regardless, that should not affect avoidance!

author: JB
text: Done. Branch is clean: avoidance is fully restored, ledger updated so future perf-hunts won't re-propose hunger-gated until there's a feeding loop.

author: JB
text: The report's actual recommendation for what to hunt next was pretty clear: the FOV atan2 removal in `update_perception_system` is the one that unlocks the `defer-rotation` savings. That's probably the better use of effort.

author: JB
text: abandon the branch and just update our perf learning etc and get back onto main, take a look at the snapshot I took, perf looks good, avoidance looks to be working, but we have 2 big things to clear up! why did a autmated test not identify that we had broken avoidance!? we must fix that. 2nd to that, I have seen a bug, our L1 grid biomass stats are wrong, clearly it is picking up creatures from outside its grid space as i can visually see a large crit in adjacent grid but that grid is not registering any large crit at all and the one I am in is registering it. Log that as an urgetn bug to fix after we fit the gap in avoidance regresssion testing.
